title: No to resolutions; yes to experiments
description: January is full of big promises. New planners. Fresh goals. Bold declarations about what we’ll finally do differently this year. I’m not immune, but I'm working hard to stop that fresh-year-I'm-going-to-do-everything-better thinking. This week’s newsletter is about a better option—one that doesn’t rely on willpower, perfection, or grand plans. Instead, it borrows an idea from neuroscience that feels far more realistic for solo marketers: tiny experiments.
author: Marketing By One | for Solo Entrepreneurs, Creators & Marketers
